message.content:
@startuml
participant "host" as Host
participant "rcv" as Rcv
participant "controller" as Controller

participant "MultiDisplayService" as MultiDisplayService

participant "IMultipleDisplaysUiController" as IMultipleDisplaysUiController
participant "IMultipleDisplaysDelegate" as IMultipleDisplaysDelegate

participant "DisplaysSwapViewController" as DisplaysSwapViewController
participant "DisplaysSwapPresenter" as DisplaysSwapPresenter

MultiDisplayService ..> IMultipleDisplaysUiController : onDisplayAdded
MultiDisplayService ..> IMultipleDisplaysUiController : updateDisplayInfos
MultiDisplayService ..> IMultipleDisplaysUiController : onDisplayRemoved
MultiDisplayService ..> IMultipleDisplaysUiController : updateDisplayInfos

IMultipleDisplaysUiController ..> IMultipleDisplaysDelegate : swap()
DisplaysSwapViewController ..> DisplaysSwapPresenter : swap()
DisplaysSwapPresenter ..> DisplaysSwapViewController : onUpdateDisplayInfo(IMultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
DisplaysSwapPresenter ..> DisplaysSwapViewController : loadMonitorsIndicator()

IMultipleDisplaysUiController ..> IMultipleDisplaysDelegate : onUpdateDisplayInfo(IMultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
Host ..> MultiDisplayService : notifyMultiDisplayChanged(type: MultiDisplayChangeType, displayId: Int)

@enduml
